name: disclosure-group
visual_summary: A DisclosureGroup is a collapsible container used to reveal and hide content. It helps in organizing content and improving user experience by reducing clutter when content is hidden. A developer would use this when they want to toggle visibility of certain information on their UI.
generation_prompt:

Description: A DisclosureGroup is a collapsible container used to reveal and hide content. It helps in organizing content and improving user experience by reducing clutter when content is hidden. A developer would use this when they want to toggle visibility of certain information on their UI.
Style: 
Interactions: collapsible
Tags: collapsible, container, toggle

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
